ops.title: Single-source capt-hook wiring: plugin-canonical migration + fleet sweep
ops.description:
Master plan: `/Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/look-at-the-bootstrap-getaway-plugin-refactored-popcorn.md` (supersedes acct-08's `one-incident-worth-eventual-pretzel.md`; do NOT resume session ec27d610).

Phases: (A) capt-hook v9.0.0 — `captain_hook/hooks/hooks.json` full Event enum, register-hooks machinery deleted, once-guard branch bf99a554 rebased in; (B) cc-context 0.12.0 + show 0.1.6 drop duplicate `capt-hook run` entries; (C) fleet migration — per-account plugin updates FIRST, then delete the `hooks` block from `plugin/guides/json/settings-base.json` (cc-skills), `[packs.fixes]` into repo-bootstrap templates + getaway, getaway `local.fragment.json` → `{}`, `cc-guides-render` broadcast, script sweep of non-fragment `settings*.json` (captain-hook repo: `"captain-hook@captain-hook": false`); (D) cc-guides GHA cleanup (shared install composite + `ci-render` subcommand); (E) single-fire verification; (F) records.

Key mechanics: CC hook dedup key is `${pluginRoot ?? ""}\x00<command>` (anthropics/claude-code#76297) — settings+plugin double-register multi-fires; cc-guides JSON merge is union-only (no key deletion) so rendered-artifact edits self-revert — fragment-managed repos migrate via the settings-base fragment + re-render, never via direct artifact edits.

ops.text: capt-hook v9.0.0 on PyPI ships hooks/hooks.json covering the full Event enum and no register-hooks command
cc-context ≥0.12.0 and show ≥0.1.6 plugin hooks.json carry no `capt-hook run` entries
plugin/guides/json/settings-base.json has no hooks key; fleet re-render broadcast completed and guides CI green
~/Code/*/.claude/settings*.json contain zero canonical capt-hook hook groups (dogfood launchers preserved)
fresh session fires exactly one capt-hook dispatch per event (incl. SubagentStart, PreCompact)
